items.title: New loop process — The Gmail auth expiry fix is reactive. A proactive health-check process (periodic credential validity probe, alerting before expiry rather than after failure) would be a natural follow-on. Not actioned by this build — candidate for a future fact-find.
items.body: New loop process — The Gmail auth expiry fix is reactive. A proactive health-check process (periodic credential validity probe, alerting before expiry rather than after failure) would be a natural follow-on. Not actioned by this build — candidate for a future fact-find.
